criteria.criterion_text: EMD Rs. 17,600/- valid 180 days from date of opening in favour of DIG GC Bilaspur payable at SBI Main Branch Bilaspur
Minimum average annual financial turnover of the tenderer should be at least 30% of the estimated cost put to tender during the last three years ending 31st March of the previous financial year
criteria.evidence_type: CA-certified audited balance sheet with UDIN number

criteria.criterion_text: One similar completed work costing not less than 80% of the estimated cost put to tender in CRPF/CPWD/MES/NBCC/BRO/State PWD during the last 03 financial years
criteria.evidence_type: Completion certificate from Executive Engineer or above

criteria.criterion_text: Two similar completed works costing not less than 60% of the estimated cost put to tender in CRPF/CPWD/MES/NBCC/BRO/State PWD during the last 03 financial years
criteria.evidence_type: Completion certificate from Executive Engineer or above

criteria.criterion_text: Three similar completed works costing not less than 40% of the estimated cost put to tender in CRPF/CPWD/MES/NBCC/BRO/State PWD during the last 03 financial years
criteria.evidence_type: Completion certificate from Executive Engineer or above

criteria.criterion_text: Valid registration as Contractor with CPWD/MES/NBCC/BRO/State PWD in respective categories
criteria.evidence_type: Registration certificate valid on the last date of submission

criteria.criterion_text: Copy of valid registration certificate of GST, EPF and ESIC
criteria.evidence_type: GST certificate, EPF registration, ESIC registration

criteria.criterion_text: Contractor should have a valid PAN Number
